result.stdout:
Description:
  A SQL Server/T-SQL linter, static analyzer, and formatter

Usage:
  TsqlRefine.Cli [<paths>...] [command] [options]

Arguments:
  <paths>  SQL files to process

Options:
  -c, --config <config>            Configuration file path
  --utf8                           Set console encoding to UTF-8 (stdin and stdout)
  --allow-plugins                  Enable loading of plugin DLLs from configuration
  --ignorelist <ignorelist>        Ignore patterns file
  --detect-encoding                Auto-detect file encoding
  --stdin                          Read from stdin
  --max-file-size <max-file-size>  Maximum file size in MB (default: 10)
  --output <output>                Output format (text/json)
  --compat-level <compat-level>    SQL Server compatibility level (100-160)
  --severity <severity>            Minimum severity level (error/warning/info/hint)
  --preset <preset>                Preset ruleset (recommended/strict/pragmatic/security-only)
  --ruleset <ruleset>              Custom ruleset name or file path
  --verbose                        Show detailed information
  -q, --quiet                      Suppress informational stderr output (for IDE/extension integration)
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information
  --version                        Show version information

Commands:
  lint <paths>                 Analyze SQL files for rule violations
  format <paths>               Format SQL files (keyword casing, whitespace)
  fix <paths>                  Auto-fix issues that support fixing
  init                         Initialize configuration files
  print-config                 Print effective configuration
  print-format-config <paths>  Print effective formatting options
  list-rules                   List available rules
  list-plugins                 List loaded plugins

result.stdout:
Description:
  Auto-fix issues that support fixing

Usage:
  TsqlRefine.Cli [<paths>...] fix [<paths>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <paths>  SQL files to process

Options:
  --ignorelist <ignorelist>        Ignore patterns file
  --detect-encoding                Auto-detect file encoding
  --stdin                          Read from stdin
  --max-file-size <max-file-size>  Maximum file size in MB (default: 10)
  --output <output>                Output format (text/json)
  --compat-level <compat-level>    SQL Server compatibility level (100-160)
  --severity <severity>            Minimum severity level (error/warning/info/hint)
  --preset <preset>                Preset ruleset (recommended/strict/pragmatic/security-only)
  --ruleset <ruleset>              Custom ruleset name or file path
  --rule <rule>                    Rule ID to apply
  --verbose                        Show detailed information
  -q, --quiet                      Suppress informational stderr output (for IDE/extension integration)
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information
  -c, --config <config>            Configuration file path
  --utf8                           Set console encoding to UTF-8 (stdin and stdout)
  --allow-plugins                  Enable loading of plugin DLLs from configuration

result.stdout:
Description:
  Initialize configuration files

Usage:
  TsqlRefine.Cli [<paths>...] init [options]

Arguments:
  <paths>  SQL files to process

Options:
  --force                        Overwrite existing configuration files
  --global                       Create configuration in home directory (~/.tsqlrefine/)
  --preset <preset>              Preset ruleset (recommended/strict/pragmatic/security-only)
  --compat-level <compat-level>  SQL Server compatibility level (100-160)
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information
  -c, --config <config>          Configuration file path
  --utf8                         Set console encoding to UTF-8 (stdin and stdout)
  --allow-plugins                Enable loading of plugin DLLs from configuration

result.stdout:
Description:
  List available rules

Usage:
  TsqlRefine.Cli [<paths>...] list-rules [options]

Arguments:
  <paths>  SQL files to process

Options:
  --output <output>      Output format (text/json)
  --category <category>  Filter rules by category
  --fixable              Show only fixable rules
  --enabled-only         Show only enabled rules
  --preset <preset>      Preset ruleset (recommended/strict/pragmatic/security-only)
  --ruleset <ruleset>    Custom ruleset name or file path
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
  -c, --config <config>  Configuration file path
  --utf8                 Set console encoding to UTF-8 (stdin and stdout)
  --allow-plugins        Enable loading of plugin DLLs from configuration

  --allow-plugins                Enable loading of plugin DLLs from configuration
